title: Preparing students for life in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Preparing students for life in New Zealand
Information is available to help your students plan their move to New Zealand and settle quickly once they get here.

## Preparing to travel to New Zealand
There are several online resources available to help your students plan their trip to New Zealand, find out what they will need once here and what it is like to live in New Zealand.
The Think New website has information to help your students to plan their trip to New Zealand, and make sure they know how things work here.
Naumai NZ — Think New, New Zealand Education

### Arriving in New Zealand
There is also information on this website and the Think New website about the documents your students will need when they get here, and what it is like to live in New Zealand.
Before you leave — Live and Work New Zealand
Living in New Zealand — Think New, New Zealand Education

### Studying in New Zealand
People with visitor visas can study for up to 3 months. Those from visa waiver countries can study for up to 3 months in any 12-month period. Find out more about the visas your students could be using.
Visas for studying in New Zealand
Visa Waiver Visitor Visa

## What your students can bring
New Zealand has very strict laws on what people can bring into the country. To make sure your students are aware of what they can and cannot bring to New Zealand, refer them to the New Zealand Customs Service and the Ministry for Primary Industries websites.
New Zealand Customs Service
How to declare items when arriving in NZ — Ministry for Primary Industries
